entries.title: Macy’s AI Closes the Sale Before Shoppers Walk Away
entries.summary: Seven in 10 online shopping carts are abandoned before purchase. Retailers have spent decades trying to close that gap through discount pop-ups, email reminders, loyalty incentives and recommendation engines. The rate hasn’t moved much. Macy’s is trying something different. Ask Macy’s, a conversational artificial intelligence shopping assistant built on Google’s Gemini Enterprise for Customer [&#8

entries.title: Microsoft Scout Ushers in New Category of AI Autopilots
entries.summary: Microsoft has begun rolling out an “always-on personal agent” called Microsoft Scout that is integrated across Microsoft 365 apps, performs tasks and builds context so it can become aligned to the priorities of each user. The company is making Microsoft Scout available to a select group of customers in private preview and to Frontier organizations, it said in a Tuesday (June […] The post Mic

entries.title: HearstLab and Fitch Learning take stake in Founderz to bridge AI literacy gap at banks
entries.summary: Fitch Learning, the global leader in financial services education, and Founderz, Europe’s premier AI business school, today announced a strategic partnership that will provide learners worldwide with innovative, personalized training that combines Fitch’s deep expertise in financial services education with Founderz’s award-winning, multilingual AI learning platform and global community reach.

entries.title: Uber Caps AI Coding Costs After Using Up Annual Budget
entries.summary: Uber is limiting its employees to $1,500 in monthly token spending per artificial intelligence coding tool, Bloomberg reported Tuesday (June 2). The limits apply only to agentic coding software, and they apply to each tool, so employees can spend $1,500 on each different tool, according to the report, which cited an Uber spokesperson. Uber […] The post Uber Caps AI Coding Costs After Using U

entries.title: The AI House Hunter Meets a Skeptical Market
entries.summary: Realtor.com launched RealAssist AI, a conversational assistant built on Google’s Gemini that lets buyers describe what they want in plain language and receive listings: pulling in MLS data, affordability calculations and agent connections without the traditional filter interface. A broader rollout follows a current beta. The timing is deliberate and complicated. The 2026 housing […] The post

entries.title: DNB Bank expands partnership with Infosys for AI-driven financial crime operations
entries.summary: Infosys (NSE, BSE, NYSE: INFY), a global leader in AI-first business consulting and technology services, today announced the expansion of its strategic collaboration with DNB Bank ASA (DNB), Norway’s largest bank, to modernize its Financial Crime (FinCrime) operations using NICE Actimize X-Sight Enterprise platform.

entries.title: Ixopay unveils AI payments assistant and intelligence platform
entries.summary: Ixopay, the performance layer powering global payments for the agentic era, today announced Ixopay Payments Intelligence, a unified control center that transforms fragmented payment data into real-time, actionable insights.

entries.title: Mastercard shuffles leadership
entries.summary: Mastercard today announced a series of leadership updates that build on the company’s strategy and momentum by sharpening execution and deepening its customer focus in support of its continued growth.

entries.title: EBA and NYDFS ink stablecoin MoU
entries.summary: The European Banking Authority (EBA) has signed a Memorandum of Understanding (MoU) with the New York State Department of Financial Services (NYDFS) under the Markets in Crypto-Assets Regulation (MiCA).

entries.title: OpenAI launches Codex plugins for finance pros
entries.summary: OpenAI has unveiled public equity investing and investment banking plugins for its Codex coding agent.

entries.title: XTransfer and BBVA team i cross-border payments
entries.summary: XTransfer, the world’s leading B2B cross-border trade payment platform, and BBVA, a global financial group, have signed a Memorandum of Understanding (MOU) during Money20/20 Europe 2026 in Amsterdam to deepen cross-border payment infrastructure across Latin America and Europe.

entries.title: How the October 2025 VoP Deadline Showed What Could Be Possible
entries.summary: Joining FinextraTV at NextGen Nordics 2026 in Stockholm, Paulo Barbosa, COO, Banfico helped to discuss verification of payee progress. Following on from the implementation deadline in October 2025, Barbosa describes what lessons can be learn from the perceived success of what was seen as a tight deadline. entries.title: Investing app Plynk revamps app
entries.summary: Plynk, the award-winning investing app designed to uncomplicate the investing experience and empower users with confidence-boosting tools, announced its app upgrade and rebrand alongside the launch of the dividend match, a first-of its-kind offer.

entries.title: Fintech Wise probed over AML concerns
entries.summary: A Belgian prosecutor is looking into “indications of non-compliance,” particularly from “a lack of proper identification of clients and their activities.”

entries.summary: ING, Worldline and Mastercard have carried out what they claims is Europe's first end-to-end agentic payment transaction.

entries.summary: Franklin Templeton and MoonPay today announced a strategic partnership to make tokenized financial products more accessible and usable across the onchain financial ecosystem.

entries.summary: LSEG Risk Intelligence today announced, at Money 20/20 Europe, the launch of Identity Gateway, a new technology infrastructure layer designed to simplify access to trusted digital identity schemes.
